headline: UAL Drives Network Expansion Through New Nonstop Service to St. Croix
summary: United Airlines expands Caribbean reach with new nonstop St. Croix-Newark service, becoming the only airline linking the island to NYC.

raw.headline: UAL Drives Network Expansion Through New Nonstop Service to St. Croix

headline: United Airlines (UAL) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Please refer to our earnings release, Form 10-K and 10-Q and other reports filed with the SEC by United Airlines Holdings and United Airlines for a more thorough description of these factors.  Joining us today to discuss our results and outlook are Chief Executive Officer, Scott Kirby; President, Brett Hart; Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, Andrew Nocella; and Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Mike Leskinen.

headline: Trade Tracker: Brian Belski buys American Airlines and Hyatt Hotels
summary: Brian Belski, Founder, CEO & Chief Investment Officer at Humilis Investment Strategies, joins 'Halftime Report' to detail his latest travel buys.

headline: Newark Liberty International Leads All Major Northeast Airports with Most On-Time Flights in 2026
summary: Newark Liberty International (EWR) has led all major northeast airports so far this year with the most on-time flights in 2026. That's a notable achievement given the airport's ranking about a year ago.

raw.headline: Newark Liberty International Leads All Major Northeast Airports with Most On-Time Flights in 2026

headline: How The Narrative On United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Is Shifting Without New Analyst Targets
summary: United Airlines Holdings heads into this update with analysts keeping price targets unchanged, signaling that official expectations around the stock’s valuation are steady for now. With no fresh price target moves to track, the focus shifts to how existing views might evolve as new information emerges. Read on to see how to monitor future shifts in the analyst narrative around United and what that can mean for your own decision making. Stay updated as the Fair Value for United Airlines...

headline: Asian shares mostly slip as latest fighting undermines the US-Iran ceasefire.
summary: Monday on Wall Street, U.S. stocks ticked to more records. The S&P 500 added 0.3% to close at 7,599.96 and the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.1% to 51,078.88. The Nasdaq composite climbed 0.4% to 27,086.81.
